German Credit.forget_policy: foreign worker, age<35, low checking balance

BAFS_status.source_note: Place the Bank Account Fraud Dataset Suite CSV files under public_data/bafs/. The common public entry is the Feedzai/BAF project with Kaggle-hosted data; Kaggle authentication is required in many environments.
BAFS_status.run_behavior: If at least one expected CSV is present, run_validation_v6.py evaluates the first available file.
